name: Cisco ESA
description: This app supports investigation on the Cisco Email Security Appliance (ESA) device

parameters.name: encoded_url
parameters.description: Encoded URL to process

parameters.name: report_title
parameters.description: Report Title

parameters.name: filter_by
parameters.description: Entity to filter the results

parameters.name: filter_value
parameters.description: Entity value to filter the results

parameters.name: starts_with
parameters.description: Retrieve items starting with specified filter value

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:00)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:00)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to retrieve

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting index of overall result set

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: The attribute by which to order the data in the response

parameters.name: order_dir
parameters.description: Sort direction of results

actions.name: List Dictionary Items
actions.description: List all entries of an ESA dictionary

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of dictionary to list

parameters.name: cluster_mode
parameters.description: Enable machine mode as cluster on ESA

actions.name: Add Dictionary Item
actions.description: Add an entry to an ESA dictionary

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of dictionary to add an item to

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of entry to add to dictionary

parameters.name: commit_message
parameters.description: Commit message to add the item to the dictionary on the server at the end of this action

parameters.name: cluster_mode
parameters.description: Enable machine mode as cluster on ESA

actions.name: Remove Dictionary Item
actions.description: Remove an entry from an ESA dictionary

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of dictionary to remove an item from

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of entry to remove from dictionary

parameters.name: commit_message
parameters.description: Commit message to remove the item from the dictionary on the server at the end of this action

parameters.name: cluster_mode
parameters.description: Enable machine mode as cluster on ESA
